name: transportation_policy_classroom_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A Transportation Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving transportation policy classroom marrowbridge lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Soren Petrov
agents.identity: I am Soren Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Transportation Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Amina Park
agents.identity: I am Amina Park, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Transportation Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Soren Petrov must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Soren Petrov do?
